title: Aurora, 23332, ebba Baby Baby Eco Ryker Rex Dragon Rattle, 6In, Recycled Soft Toy, Green
features: Ryker Dragon is part of our Aurora's gorgeous baby range ebba, which is suitable for newborns up.
Designed especially for babies with embroidered eyes and using super soft plush materials and is suitable for any age group.
Every soft toy is made using recycled plastics to include the fibre fill. No more plastic beans
A beautiful baby Dragon Rattle soft toy which will make the perfect gift for newborns, baby showers and Christenings.
description: Ebba Eco is Aurora World’s fabulous range of baby soft toys made from recycled plastics. Introducing our lovable Ryker Rex Dragon rattle. Every soft toy animal has been made using recycled plastic bottles. This includes the outer plush material and also the fibre fill. We have removed all plastic beans and are using embroidered instead of plastic eyes to make this item as Eco-friendly as possible. Our hangtag can be recycled and shows the process of making our soft toy. This is a gorgeous super soft green dragon with a rattle inside and a huggable body that is so soft to the touch, making this a plush toy perfect for snuggles. We are very proud to have created such a gorgeous collection of extremely soft and touchable soft toys which will make a great gift. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products.
